stages.objective: Observe mixed read/write operation order in filesystem trace.
stages.goal: Verify both operation classes execute through required path/mapping flow.
stages.theory_detail: Mixed I/O sequences require preserving correct order while maintaining mapping correctness.

hints.nudge: Track read then write phases separately.
hints.concept: Mixed workflows fail when one phase omits required implementation steps.
hints.explicit: Annotate trace by phase and verify fs.path + fs.blockmap coverage.

stages.goal: Pass trace and completion checks for the full mixed sequence.

hints.concept: Partial sequence success is insufficient for mixed workload correctness.
hints.explicit: Run through final syscall exit and verify required trace events before submit.

stages.objective: Tune scenario settings and keep mixed-sequence correctness intact.
stages.goal: Use bounded edits while preserving all required validators.

hints.explicit: Apply one tune, rerun from reset, then validate trace+completion checks.
